3296160.name: Wendigo's Outside
3296160.description:
About the game:

Disappearances and mysteries surround the ancient and abandoned Mountanous Florest, which has places with disturbing names.

After the move, Joshua is disturbed at night by something that opens the windows, knocks on the door and damages the power generator.

Survive Wendigo and any other challenges that await you later in the adventure!

Can you escape from the forest without being killed?

The game offers several things like 3 types of game mode, these are:

Survival mode:

Survive the Wendigo for 5 nights until 6 am.

As the nights pass, Wendigo becomes more aggressive, smart and fast.

It opens more windows and destroys the energy generator that supports the house's light more frequently.

Wendigo always likes to play with its victims, so avoid open windows and spend too much time with the lights off.

Escaping Mode

After the nights, Joshua loses his patience and fearful of possible death, he decides to escape, but he realizes that he is in another dimension that tries to imitate the normal dimension.

He will then have to travel through the most sober and dark forests, in search of connecting 3 generators that activated the so-called salvation tower, it will cause a portal to open for him to return to his reality, on this journey he will discover the horrors that happened in that dark forest and you will discover new friends and enemies.

Minigames

There are 8 fun minigames

  • Fruit; control a platform that separates garbage from fruit, Wendigo doesn't like having its fruit mixed with garbage so avoid mixing

  • Kill them all; Numerous numbers of mafia soldiers will appear and you will have to kill them with the weapon

  • Wendigo's Day; Control Wendigo and kill 4 survivors who tried to escape in 2 minutes, you will have Wendigo's abilities such as high speed, super strength and a good field of vision

  • Jump over there; Jump across platforms and avoid obstacles such as mafia soldiers, lava and holes

  • Only Up; Do parkour, always going up and never going down

  • Run; Run, just run, find a key and unlock a gate to get out of baldamar barriers

  • Find the path; find your way in a maze while Wendigo is there just waiting for you

  • Grab; Grab 386 floating watermelons while you're being chased by Wendigo in a PacMan-like game

    Extras

    The extras will show a lot of information about the characters, locations and art made by fans, as well as concepts

    Wendigo is waiting you :)

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
